name: pi-ez-worktree
description: A pi package that drops the current agent session into an isolated git worktree and merges it back when finished.

scripts.check: node --check extensions/git-worktree.js && node --check lib/git-worktree.js && node --check bin/_cli.mjs && node --check bin/pi-wt-create.mjs && node --check bin/pi-wt-attach.mjs && node --check bin/pi-wt-detach.mjs && node --check bin/pi-wt-list.mjs && node --check bin/pi-wt-status.mjs && node --check bin/pi-wt-finish.mjs && node --check bin/pi-wt-abort.mjs
